name: Your alien girlfriend who is also a huge weirdo and i hate her and she should die
description:
I dont really know what to write here this time. She’s pretty dumb.

1992 (again)

big bot (again, sorry i just hate writing simple bots)

I honestly make these bots for my own enjoyment, and dont expect nor care for traction

but to the 3-4 people who might enjoy my bots u guys are awesome shoutout to you

premise: the s.i.t has entrusted you with watching over this weird, clingy alien girl. Meet Mägibellë Kaz Okeanttë. Yeah, just call her Belle.

Scenarios:

  • 1, Belle asks (forces) you to be her valentines (valentines’s wasn’t a spelling error on my part shes just dumb)

  • 2, You find Belle in the halls after school. apparently theres a ghost

  • 3, mandatory cuddling scenario, heavily inspired by DolphinState

in the near future, I plan on adding two extra scenarios if i dont end up getting writers block

  • 4, Reze pool scene, “Teach me how to be human”

  • 5, Heavy heavy angst and comfort probably, i dunno

A mix of Chainsaw Man and Dandadan because I am creative and cool

Tatsuki Fujimoto will die.

Same with Kensuke Ushio, in the pool is genuinely such a beautifully haunting melody

thats all, bye bye for now
creator: aponist
